snazzy.quote: Conversion rate up from 65% to 82%. Agent workload reduced by 40%. Lead response time under 2 minutes.
snazzy.author: Ayush Pateria

orbit.quote: Call abandonment down to 5% from ~30%. 75-80% of inbound calls fully handled by Finn. 24/7 AI coverage replaced 80+ offshore agents.
orbit.author: Shikha Chouksey

frinks.quote: 70% of production-support calls now contained. 800+ man-hours saved every month. Wait time reduced to under 30 seconds.
frinks.author: David Johnson

tofa.quote: TOFA launched a national campaign with Finn — 10K+ calls daily and seamless human escalations.
tofa.author: Alice Smith

rocketsdr.quote: RocketSDR improved candidate experience and reduced offer drop-offs with Finn 24×7 AI helpline and proactive escalations.
rocketsdr.author: Shivansh

pbs.quote: Pillar Bridge scaled multilingual customer support — handling case details and payments in Hindi, Tamil, and Kannada with zero wait time and perfect empathy.
pbs.author: Rajesh Bangera
